---
title: "Kader Library"
description: "Illustrated, from-scratch explainers — one topic at a time, each built to actually make the idea click. A growing collection."
listing:
  contents: explainers/**/index.qmd
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 2
  categories: numbered
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: true
  fields: [image, title, description, categories, date, reading-time]
  feed: true
page-layout: full
include-in-header:
  - text: |
      <style>
        .lib-hero{ border:1px solid #2b2620; outline:4px double #2b2620; outline-offset:4px; border-radius:2px; padding:1.8rem 2rem; margin:1rem 0 2rem; background:#f9f3e6; text-align:center; }
        .lib-hero h2{ color:#241f1a !important; margin:0 0 .5rem; font-size:1.7rem; border:none; font-family:'EB Garamond',Georgia,serif; }
        .lib-hero p{ margin:0 auto; color:#5c5247; font-size:1.02rem; max-width:60ch; font-family:'EB Garamond',Georgia,serif; font-style:italic; }
        .quarto-listing .card{ border-radius:14px; }
      </style>
---

```{=html}
<div class="lib-hero">
  <h2>📚 Kader Library</h2>
  <p>Illustrated, from-scratch explainers — each one built to make a single idea genuinely click, with diagrams and interactive bits. New chapters get added over time.</p>
</div>
```
